case_title: FINGER, II WESLEY vs. CHAMPION INTERNATIONAL CORPORATION et al

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF FEB-26-1996, CONTINUED TO APR-26-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR DISMISSAL. PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF APR-26-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON APR-26-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR MAY-28-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
